# **\--Soul Energy--**

Website info triumphs here.

* Isekai History  
  * A mysterious energy capable of shaping reality based on the spell being applied. It is dimensionless and universeless when combining to form a soul, but pops into and from existence when unorganized.  
* Body & Gene  
  * **The body** is the physical representation based on genes.  
    * Object in OOP.  
  * **Gene** is the physical materialization of the soul by the aggregate of what the memories of the soul are.  
    * Class in OOP.  
* Soul & Memories  
  * **Soul** is a group of virtual particles (quantum foam) that merge and form a being. This is where the conscience and Soul Energy lives when not linked to a physical body.  
    * Database in OOP.  
    * Soul energy is also quantum foam that is stored within one’s soul.  
    * When procreating, the male and female bodies release some of their energy to prompt nearby quantum foam to coalesce and form a new being. That is why the emotional character of babies looks random.  
  * **Memories** are stored within the soul.  
    * The stronger the emotion felt, the longer lasting the memory will be.  
    * The physical body can alter memories through interference with thought processes.  
    * The collection of memories forms the soul's genetic information.  
* Lifespan & Aging  
  * Lifespan is determined by how strong or weak the flesh is connected to the soul, and the number of said connections (as in density) there are.  
  * Aging is the process of connections deteriorating or their density decreasing. As it stands, there has been no scientific breakthrough to renew the connection, or in other words, extend life.  
    * Maybe someone cracked it, but they aren’t sharing details.  
    * Every time a person loses a limb and then regrows it, the density of soul connections decreases, thereby reducing the person's potential lifespan. Reconnecting the lost limb before healing is a must to reduce unnecessary aging.  
  * Soul strength also follows a Bell Curve profile, with early adulthood having the most resilience, making revival virtually guaranteed. The same cannot be said for infants and the elderly. The exact reason is not fully known, but there are theories that memories play a part, alongside the soul infused by parents (for infants) and how fulfilling you lived your life (for the elderly).![Bell Curve - Overview, Characteristics, Uses][image1]  
* Soul Life Cycle & Soul Death  
  * When a person dies (heart stops, brain stops, etc.), the soul remains connected to the flesh due to genetic material (if there is still a connection).  
    * If there is no genetic material left, then the soul is completely unliked.  
    * If the genetic material is worn down, resuscitation may be impaired.  
    * When a person is **dead**, they experience a dream-like state, usually of their strongest memories repeating in a loop or of their strongest desire.  
  * As the person's body ages and their genetic material decays, so does the soul's connection to the living flesh.  
  * A disconnected soul will slowly decay back into quantum foam (a.k.a Soul Death)  
    * The more Soul Energy capacity and stronger memories an individual has at the time of death, the longer it takes for the soul to dissipate fully.   
    * See Power Time. Replace Hours with Years for an average decay time.  
  * See Soul Bind for additional info, including side effects of resuscitation  
* Soul Energy Expansion  
  * The ability to expand one’s soul's ability to store more soul energy.   
  * When a child is born/individual is summoned, the Soul size is a portion of the parent's size.  
  * Although, like any exercise, it is tiring and time-consuming to see any effects, those who persevere will be more resilient against detachment (a.k.a. the technical term for soul death) and able to store more energy.   
  * Still, it’s far easier to grab a nari stick to power up spells than to put your own energy into it, so coincidentally, there’s a trend between more affluent people having less soul energy since they can chuck a couple of balls for someone else to deal with it.  
* Soul Energy Quantity Detection  
  * See the Embassy badge for more information on how to find out how much Soul Energy they currently have.   
  * Touching the badge does not drain Soul Energy.  
* Soul Energy Recharge  
  * Soul energy is recharged through emotions & eating.  
  * On average, a single Nari’s worth of soul energy is replenished a day  
    * More or less depending on the intensity of emotions and an individual’s ability.  
  * Eating a living being causes some of its soul energy to be sucked into the person eating it.  
* Soul Energy Spells Detection  
  * It varies by species/interface used. Some species can use their organs to sense soul energy, such as Darfaries/Wozefaries/Sorefaries.  
* Soul Energy Tiers  
  * See Formulas \- Soul Energy

# 

# **\--Interfaces--**

* Isekai History  
  * There are many ways to interface with Soul Energy, some of which give you greater control over the soul energy, whereas others do not.  
  * Darfaries & Nari Gels are examples of interfaces, but other races, fauna, and even beasts have their own interfaces.  
    * More often than not, such interfaces are part of their bodies.  
* Soul Energy to Spell Conversion  
  * Rules vary based on the interface being used.
